chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-1727 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 13.8.2025 Mr.Mohan Lal K. Rathore, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Petitioners, which is taken on record. Mr.Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Asst. A.G Sindh ********** Through the instant petition, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that for implementation of Order dated 30.11.2005 passed by Executive District Officer (Revenue) Tharparkar @ Mithi (available at Page No.41 of the Court file), the Petitioners have moved an application to the Divisional Commissioner, Mirpurkhas (available at page No.47), who forwarded the same to the A.C Chahchro, but no action has been taken till today. However, he seeks disposal of instant petition, if the Respondent No.6 is directed to decide the application of Petitioner expeditiously. Learned A.A.G. does not oppose such request and assures that the application of the Petitioners shall be decided strictly in accordance with law. In view of the foregoing, the instant petition stands disposed of with directions to the Respondent No.6, to decide the Petitioner’s pending application within two weeks from the date of receipt of this order. Office is directed to communicate a copy of this order to the learned A.A.G. for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
